product_name: Hot Wheels Creative Maker Kitz - Custom Racer Kit Super Van

bullets: GET READY TO RACE - This custom kit van is tough and fast! Build the vehicle from the pop out parts, pull back and watch it fly over the customisable stunt ramp provided!
CUSTOMISABLE - Decorate the Super Van to make it your own with the five Hot Wheels coloured marker pens included with this creative kit!

EASY TO BUILD - This custom kit is easy to build requiring no glue or scissors making it a safe and fun activity for children to do independently or with an adult. It is also recognised as having some STEM learning benefits!
ECO FRIENDLY - With the car body made entirely from recyclable material and the packaging doubling up as a stunt ramp that you can also decorate, this is a great eco friendly toy!
OFFICIAL LICENSED HOT WHEELS TOY - Featuring one of the best known Hot Wheels vehicles, this kit allows children to build and decorate their vehicle as well as play when completed!
content.description: Maker Kitz are the Hot Wheels™ cars YOU build - pop out the pre-cut plastic panels and assemble the tough snap-fit parts! Add power with pull-back motors - then use the pens included to create YOUR unique custom design! The assembled van is tough enough to race, even perform jumps using the card launch ramp provided! Build, Race & Collect Hot Wheels™ Maker Kitz!

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x Car Body Panel Kit, 2 x Sets of Wheels with Pull Back Motor, 5 x Coloured Pens, 1 x Cardboard Stunt Ramp, 1 x Instruction Manual

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
